introSection: Super Railway was a sit-down roller coaster located at Antibes Land in Antibes, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France. It is currently unknown if the ride is currently traveling in a fair or fully defunct.
fullText: Super Railway was a sit-down roller coaster located at Antibes Land in Antibes, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France. It is currently unknown if the ride is currently traveling in a fair or fully defunct.
